 # trae-plugin-cc
 
-trae-plugin-cc支持在 **Claude Code** 和 **OpenCode**中无缝调用trae-cli，提供任务委托、代码审查、会话管理、ACP 协议通信等功能，实现跨框架一致的 AI Agent 协作体验。
+A **dual-platform** plugin that bridges [**Claude Code**](https://claude.ai/code) and [**OpenCode**](https://opencode.ai) with ByteDance [**Trae Agent**](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) (`trae-cli`). Delegate natural language tasks, run code reviews, manage sessions, and enable Agent-to-Agent communication — all inheriting trae-cli's OAuth2 auth (no extra API keys needed).
 
-## 架构
+## Features
 
+| Feature | Description |
+|---------|-------------|
+| **Task Delegation** | Send natural language prompts to Trae Agent with YOLO mode, session resume, git worktree isolation, and fine-grained tool permissions |
+| **Code Review** | Automatic git diff + professional review — standard or adversarial (extremely strict), with smart base branch detection and change-size estimation |
+| **Session Management** | Query trae-cli's history: conversations, tool calls, context summaries, topic search, and bulk cleanup |
+| **ACP Protocol** | JSON-RPC over STDIO for inter-agent communication (start/stop servers, discover agents, execute/stream tasks) |
+| **Background Tasks** | Long-running tasks with PID tracking, status listing, result retrieval, and cancellation |
+| **Lifecycle Hooks** | Auto-triggered on session start/end/stop: env checks, background task reminders, uncommitted-change gates |
+
+## Architecture
+
 ```
-┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐

-## 功能概览
+Both platforms share the same core CLI (`dist/index.js`). Claude Code invokes via slash commands/MCP/hooks; OpenCode invokes via Bun tools that `spawn("node", [dist/index.js, ...])`.
 
-| 功能 | 说明 | Claude Code | OpenCode |
-|------|------|:-----------:|:--------:|
-| 任务执行 | 自然语言任务委托，支持 YOLO、恢复、worktree | ✅ `/trae:run` + MCP | ✅ `trae-run` 工具 |
-| 代码审查 | git diff 自动审查，支持标准/对抗性模式 | ✅ `/trae:review` + MCP | ✅ `trae-review` 工具 |
-| 会话管理 | 历史会话查询、对话历史、工具调用、上下文摘要 | ✅ `/trae:sessions` + MCP | ✅ `trae-sessions` 工具 |
-| ACP 协议 | JSON-RPC over STDIO，Agent 间协作 | ✅ `/trae:acp` + MCP | ✅ `trae-acp` 工具 |
-| 后台任务 | 长时间任务后台执行，状态查询、结果获取、取消 | ✅ `/trae:status` 等 | ✅ `trae-status` 等 |
-| 故障恢复 | 分析失败任务并提供诊断建议 | ✅ `/trae:rescue` | ✅ `trae-rescue` 工具 |
-| 环境检查 | trae-cli 安装验证、认证状态检查 | ✅ `/trae:setup` | ✅ `trae-setup` 工具 |
-| 生命周期钩子 | SessionStart/SessionEnd/Stop 自动触发 | ✅ hooks.json | ✅ .opencode/plugins/ |
+## Prerequisites
 
-## 前置条件
+- **Node.js 18+** (runtime)
+- **trae-cli** installed and authenticated
 
-- [trae-cli](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) 已安装并完成 auth 认证
-
 ```bash
-# 验证 trae-cli 是否可用
+# Verify trae-cli
 trae-cli --help
 
-# 验证认证状态（需看到模型名称和登录地址）
+# Verify auth (should show model + login URL)
 cat ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml
 ```
 
-## 安装
+## Installation
 
-### Claude Code 安装
+### Claude Code
 
-#### 方式 1: Marketplace 安装（推荐）
+**Option 1: Marketplace (recommended)**
 
 ```bash
-# 添加 Marketplace
 claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc
-
-# 安装插件
 claude plugin install trae
-
-# 验证安装
 claude plugin list | grep trae
 ```
 
-安装范围选项：
-- `--scope user`（默认）: 全局可用
-- `--scope project`: 仅当前项目可用
-- `--scope local`: 仅当前会话可用
+Scope: `--scope user` (global) | `--scope project` (current project) | `--scope local` (current session)
 
-#### 方式 2: 本地目录安装
+**Option 2: Local directory**
 
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
-cd trae-plugin-cc
-npm install
-npm run build
-
-# 添加本地 Marketplace
-claude plugin marketplace add /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
+cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
+claude plugin marketplace add "$(pwd)"
 claude plugin install trae
 ```
 
-### OpenCode 安装
+### OpenCode
 
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
-cd trae-plugin-cc
-npm install
-npm run build
-
-# 安装 OpenCode 插件依赖
+cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
 cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
 ```
 
-OpenCode 会自动发现 `.opencode/tools/` 下的工具和 `.opencode/commands/` 下的命令定义。
+OpenCode auto-discovers tools in `.opencode/tools/` and commands in `.opencode/commands/`.
 
-## 安装后验证

 ```

-## 使用指南
+## Quick Start
 
-### Claude Code 使用
+### Claude Code (slash commands)
 
-#### 斜杠命令（用户主动触发）
-
-```bash
-# 执行任务
-/trae:run "重构用户认证模块"
-
-# YOLO 模式（跳过工具确认）
-/trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo
-
-# 代码审查
-/trae:review
-
-# 对抗性审查
-/trae:adversarial-review
-
-# 恢复会话
-/trae:run "继续之前的任务" --resume
-
-# 会话管理
-/trae:sessions list
-/trae:sessions detail <session-id>
-
-# ACP 协议
-/trae:acp run "分析代码质量"
-/trae:acp stream "实时分析"
 ```
+/trae:run "重构用户认证模块"           # execute task
+/trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo         # skip tool confirmations
+/trae:review                           # standard review
+/trae:adversarial-review               # adversarial review
+/trae:sessions list                    # list sessions
+/trae:acp run "分析代码质量"            # execute via ACP
+```
 
-#### MCP 工具（AI 自主决策）
+### OpenCode (Bun tools)
 
-插件安装后，`.mcp.json` 中定义的 4 个 MCP 工具自动注册，Claude AI 根据上下文自主调用：
+OpenCode Agent calls tools directly: `trae-run`, `trae-review`, `trae-sessions`, `trae-acp`, etc. See [Commands Reference](#commands-reference) for full parameter details.
 
-| 工具 | 说明 | 触发场景 |
-|------|------|---------|
-| `trae_run` | 执行任务 | "用 Trae 重构这个模块" |
-| `trae_review` | 代码审查 | "帮我审查当前变更" |
-| `trae_sessions` | 会话管理 | "我之前用 Trae 做了什么？" |
-| `trae_acp` | ACP 协议 | "通过 ACP 分析代码质量" |
+## Commands Reference
 
-#### 生命周期钩子
+All CLI commands: `node dist/index.js <command> [args]`
 
-| 钩子 | 触发时机 | 行为 |
-|------|---------|------|
-| `SessionStart` | Claude Code 启动 | 检查 trae-cli 状态，提醒后台任务 |
-| `SessionEnd` | Claude Code 退出 | 清理过期日志，提醒运行中的后台任务 |
-| `Stop` | 用户停止操作 | 检测未提交变更，建议代码审查 |
-| `PostToolUse` | 执行 `/trae:review` 后 | 记录审查结果 |
+### `setup`
 
-### OpenCode 使用
+Verify trae-cli installation and auth status.
 
-#### Bun 工具（9 个）
-
-OpenCode Agent 可直接调用这些工具：
-
-| 工具 | CLI 命令 | 功能 |
-|------|----------|------|
-| `trae-setup` | `setup` | 检查 trae-cli 安装和认证 |
-| `trae-run` | `run` | 执行自然语言任务 |
-| `trae-review` | `review` / `adversarial-review` | 代码审查 |
-| `trae-sessions` | `sessions` | 会话管理（支持 9 种动作） |
-| `trae-acp` | `acp` | ACP 协议管理 |
-| `trae-status` | `status` | 后台任务状态 |
-| `trae-result` | `result` | 获取后台任务输出 |
-| `trae-cancel` | `cancel` | 取消后台任务 |
-| `trae-rescue` | `rescue` | 故障恢复诊断 |
-
-#### 命令文档（10 个）
-
-`.opencode/commands/` 下的 Markdown 文件为 Agent 提供可直接执行的指令：
-
-- `trae-run.md` — 任务执行命令定义
-- `trae-review.md` — 代码审查
-- `trae-adversarial-review.md` — 对抗性审查
-- `trae-sessions.md` — 会话管理
-- `trae-acp.md` — ACP 协议
-- `trae-setup.md` — 环境检查
-- `trae-status.md` — 后台任务状态
-- `trae-result.md` — 获取任务结果
-- `trae-cancel.md` — 取消任务
-- `trae-rescue.md` — 故障恢复
-
-#### 事件钩子
-
-`.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts` 将 OpenCode 事件映射为插件钩子：
-- `session.created` → SessionStart 钩子
-- `session.deleted` / `server.instance.disposed` → SessionEnd 钩子
-
-## 功能详解
-
-### 1. 任务执行
-
 ```bash
-/trae:run "任务描述" [options]          # Claude Code
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-run 工具
+/trae:setup          # Claude Code
+# OpenCode: trae-setup tool (no args)
 ```
 
-| 选项 | 缩写 | 说明 |
-|------|------|------|
-| `--yolo` | `-y` | YOLO 模式，跳过工具确认 |
-| `--background` | | 后台执行 |
-| `--json` | | 结构化 JSON 输出（含 session_id） |
-| `--resume [ID]` | | 恢复会话 |
-| `--worktree [NAME]` | `-w` | 隔离 git worktree |
-| `--allowed-tool <name>` | | 自动批准的工具 |
-| `--disallowed-tool <name>` | | 自动拒绝的工具 |
-| `--inject-context <id>` | | 注入其他会话上下文 |
-| `--query-timeout <dur>` | | 单次查询超时 |
-| `-c k=v` | | 覆盖配置项 |
+---
 
-### 2. 代码审查
+### `run "prompt"`
 
-```bash
-/trae:review [options]                  # 标准审查
-/trae:adversarial-review [options]      # 对抗性审查
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-review 工具 (adversarial=true)
-```
+Delegate a natural language task to Trae Agent.
 
-- 自动检测基准分支（main/master/develop）
-- 自动估算变更规模，大型变更建议后台模式
-- 对抗性模式：极度严苛，专门挑刺和质疑假设
-
-### 3. 会话管理
-
 ```bash
-/trae:sessions <action> [options]       # Claude Code
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-sessions 工具
+/trae:run "描述任务" [options]
 ```
 
-| 动作 | 说明 | 参数 |
-|------|------|------|
-| `list` | 列出会话 | `--cwd`, `--limit` |
-| `recent` | 最近会话 | `--limit` |
-| `detail` | 会话详情 | `--session-id` |
-| `conversation` | 对话历史 | `--session-id`, `--limit` |
-| `tools` | 工具调用记录 | `--session-id` |
-| `context` | 上下文摘要 | `--session-id` |
-| `find` | 按主题搜索 | `--topic` |
-| `delete` | 删除会话 | `--session-id` |
-| `delete-smoke` | 批量删除 smoke 会话 | — |
+| Option | Alias | Description |
+|--------|-------|-------------|
+| `--background` | | Run in background (returns job ID) |
+| `--json` | | Structured JSON output with `session_id` |
+| `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool permission confirmations |
+| `--resume [ID]` | | Resume session (omit ID = auto-resume latest) |
+| `--session-id <id>` | | Specify new session ID |
+| `--worktree [name]` | `-w` | Isolated git worktree (omit name = `__auto__`) |
+| `--allowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-approve tool (repeatable) |
+| `--disallowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-reject tool (repeatable) |
+| `--query-timeout <d>` | | Per-query timeout (e.g. `30s`, `5m`) |
+| `--bash-tool-timeout <d>` | | Bash tool timeout |
+| `-c <k=v>` | | Config override (repeatable) |
+| `--inject-context <id>` | | Inject another session's context |
 
-### 4. ACP 协议通信
-
-ACP 使用 **JSON-RPC over STDIO**（标准协议），非 HTTP 服务。
-
+**Examples:**
 ```bash
-/trae:acp <action> [options]            # Claude Code
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-acp 工具
+/trae:run "重构认证模块" --background --json
+/trae:run "继续" --resume --yolo
+/trae:run "修复 bug" --worktree --allowed-tool Edit --allowed-tool Bash
 ```
 
-| 动作 | 说明 |
-|------|------|
-| `run "任务"` | 通过 ACP 执行任务 |
-| `stream "任务"` | 流式执行（实时输出） |
-| `agents` | 发现可用 Agent |
-| `status` | 查看状态 |
+---
 
-### 5. 后台任务管理
+### `review` / `adversarial-review`
 
-```bash
-/trae:status                             # 查看所有后台任务
-/trae:result <task-id>                   # 获取任务结果
-/trae:cancel <task-id>                   # 取消任务
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-status / trae-result / trae-cancel
-```
+Code review with automatic git diff.
 
-### 6. 故障恢复
-
 ```bash
-/trae:rescue [--context TEXT]            # Claude Code
-# 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-rescue 工具
+/trae:review [options]                   # standard
+/trae:adversarial-review [options]       # adversarial (strict)
+# OpenCode: trae-review tool with adversarial: true/false
 ```
 
-分析失败任务，收集错误日志和 git 状态，提交给 Trae Agent 诊断。
+| Option | Alias | Description |
+|--------|-------|-------------|
+| `--base <branch>` | | Base branch (auto-detected: main/master/develop) |
+| `--background` | | Run in background (recommended for large diffs) |
+| `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool confirmations |
+| `--json` | | Structured JSON output |
+| `--session-id <id>` | | Specify session ID |
 
-## 上下文获取路径
+Auto-detects base branch and estimates review size, recommending background mode for large changes.
 
-| 路径 | 方式 | 适用场景 |
-|------|------|---------|
-| 文件系统直读 | `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` | 查询历史会话 |
-| 结构化输出 | `trae-cli -p --json` | 执行任务并追踪 |
-| ACP STDIO | `trae-cli acp serve` (JSON-RPC) | 跨框架 Agent 协作 |
+---
 
-## 项目结构
+### `sessions <action>`
 
-```
-trae-plugin-cc/
-├── .claude-plugin/          # Claude Code 插件声明
-│   ├── plugin.json

-├── commands/                # Claude Code 斜杠命令定义 (*.md)
-├── hooks/

-│       ├── session-reader.ts      # 会话读取器
-│       ├── acp-server-manager.ts  # ACP 服务器管理 (STDIO JSON-RPC)
-│       ├── acp-client.ts          # ACP 客户端 (JSON-RPC)
-│       ├── auth-bridge.ts         # 认证桥接

-│       └── branch-detection.ts    # Git 分支检测
-├── .opencode/               # OpenCode 集成
-│   ├── tools/               # 9 个 Bun 工具 (*.ts)

+Manage trae-cli's historical sessions (reads from file cache directly — no HTTP calls).
 
-## 开发
-
 ```bash
-# 编译（修改 src/ 后必须执行）
-npm run build
-
-# 测试
-npm test
-
-# 安装 OpenCode 依赖（仅首次）
-cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
-
-# 验证插件 (Claude Code)
-claude plugin validate /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
+/trae:sessions <action> [options]
 ```
 
-### ⚠️ 编译规则
+| Action | Args | Options | Description |
+|--------|------|---------|-------------|
+| `list` | | `--cwd`, `--limit` (default 20) | List all sessions |
+| `recent` | | `--cwd` | Most recent session for cwd |
+| `detail <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Session metadata + event counts |
+| `conversation <id>` | `<session-id>` | `--limit` (default 50) | Conversation messages |
+| `tools <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Tool call stats + records (up to 30) |
+| `context <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Full context summary |
+| `find <topic>` | `<topic>` | | Search by keyword |
+| `delete <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Delete a session |
+| `delete-smoke` | | | Bulk delete sessions with "smoke" in ID/title |
 
-修改任何 `src/*.ts` 文件后必须运行 `npm run build`，因为运行时入口是 `dist/index.js`（esbuild 打包）。
+---

-| `npm run build:tsc` | `dist/**/*.js` (分离文件) | 直接模块导入 |
+### `acp <action>`
 
-### OpenCode 开发注意事项
+ACP protocol: **JSON-RPC over STDIO** (not HTTP). Enables Agent-to-Agent communication.
 
-- `.opencode/tools/*.ts` 使用 **Bun** 运行时，**无需编译**
-- `.opencode/commands/*.md` 为 Agent 提供可读指令
-- 修改 `.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts` 后重启 OpenCode 即可
-- **但**：OpenCode 工具内部调用 `dist/index.js`，所以修改 `src/` 仍需 `npm run build`

-## 全量命令参考

-### 1. `setup` — 检查 trae-cli 安装与认证状态

+|--------|------|-------------|
+| `start` | `--yolo`, `--allowed-tool`, `--disabled-tool` | Start ACP Server (blocks, keeps STDIO pipe open) |

+| `stream <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Stream task output in real-time (auto-starts server) |
 
+> **Note**: `acp start` is a blocking call — it holds the process alive for the STDIO pipe. Use `agents`, `run`, or `stream` for interactive use (they auto-start the server).

Here is the comprehensive summary of the `trae-plugin-cc` project:

---

## Comprehensive Project Summary

### 1. Project Purpose and Value Proposition

**trae-plugin-cc** is a **dual-platform** plugin that bridges **Claude Code** and **OpenCode** with ByteDance's **Trae Agent** (`trae-cli`). It provides:

- **Task delegation**: Natural language tasks sent to trae-cli (no extra API keys needed; inherits OAuth2 auth)
- **Code review**: Automatic git diff + professional review (standard or adversarial)
- **Session management**: Query history, conversation, tool calls, context summaries from trae-cli's file-based session store
- **ACP protocol**: JSON-RPC over STDIO for inter-agent communication
- **Background tasks**: Long-running tasks with status tracking, result retrieval, and cancellation
- **Lifecycle hooks**: Automated startup/end/stop behaviors

### 2. Project Metadata

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Name** | trae-plugin-cc |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Author** | wangxumarshall |
| **License** | MIT |
| **Repo** | https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc |
| **Runtime** | Node.js (bundled via esbuild), Bun (for .opencode tools) |
| **Test framework** | Jest + ts-jest |

**Dependencies**:
- Runtime: `js-yaml` (for YAML parsing of trae-cli config)
- Dev: `typescript`, `esbuild`, `jest`, `ts-jest`, `@types/jest`, `@types/node`, `@types/js-yaml`

**Scripts**:
```
build       -> esbuild bundle (production, with shebang + chmod +x)
build:tsc   -> tsc only (separate .js files, for direct imports)
test        -> jest
```

### 3. CLI Commands (from `src/commands/`)

Based on thorough reading of all source files:

#### `src/index.ts` (Entry Point)
Single entrypoint dispatching to 9 commands:

| Command | Handler | Parameters |
|---------|---------|------------|
| `setup` | `setup()` | No args |
| `review` | `review(args, false)` | `--base <branch>`, `--background`, `--yolo`/`-y`, `--json`, `--session-id <id>` |
| `adversarial-review` | `review(args, true)` | Same as review (isAdversarial=true changes prompt to "extremely strict adversarial code reviewer") |
| `run` | `runTask(args)` | See detailed breakdown below |
| `status` | `status(args)` | No args (reads .claude-trae-plugin/ for .pid files) |
| `result <task-id>` | `result(args)` | `<task-id>` as positional arg |
| `cancel <task-id>` | `cancel(args)` | `<task-id>` as positional arg (SIGKILL) |
| `rescue` | `rescue(args)` | `--context <text>` |
| `sessions` | `sessions(args)` | Sub-action: list/detail/conversation/tools/context/recent/find/delete/delete-smoke |
| `acp` | `acp(args)` | Sub-action: start/stop/status/agents/run/stream |
| `hooks` | `handleHook(args)` | `session-start`/`session-end`/`stop-gate` (internal only) |

#### Detailed `run` Command Parameters (`src/commands/run.ts`)
| Flag | Value | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| `--background` | - | Run task in background |
| `--json` | - | Structured JSON output with session_id |
| `--yolo` / `-y` | - | YOLO mode, skip tool permission confirmations |
| `--resume [id]` | optional session ID or "AUTO" | Resume previous session |
| `--session-id <id>` | required | Specify new session ID |
| `--worktree [name]` / `-w` | optional name or `__auto__` | Isolated git worktree |
| `--allowed-tool <name>` | repeatable | Auto-approve specific tools |
| `--disallowed-tool <name>` | repeatable | Auto-reject specific tools |
| `--query-timeout <dur>` | e.g., "30s", "5m" | Per-query timeout |
| `--bash-tool-timeout <dur>` | e.g., "30s" | Bash tool timeout |
| `-c <k=v>` | repeatable | Config overrides |
| `--inject-context <session-id>` | required | Inject another session's context into prompt |

#### Detailed `sessions` Sub-commands (`src/commands/sessions.ts`)
| Action | Required Args | Optional Args | Description |
|--------|--------------|---------------|-------------|
| `list` | - | `--cwd <path>`, `--limit <n>` | List all sessions (default 20) |
| `recent` | - | `--cwd <path>` | Most recent session for cwd |
| `detail <id>` | `<session-id>` | - | Session metadata + event type counts |
| `conversation <id>` | `<session-id>` | `--limit <n>` | Conversation messages (default 50) |
| `tools <id>` | `<session-id>` | - | Tool call stats + detailed records (up to 30) |
| `context <id>` | `<session-id>` | - | Full context summary |
| `find <topic>` | `<topic>` | - | Search by topic keyword |
| `delete <id>` | `<session-id>` | - | Delete a session |
| `delete-smoke` | - | - | Bulk delete sessions with "smoke" in ID or title |

#### Detailed `acp` Sub-commands (`src/commands/acp.ts`)
| Action | Args | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `start` | `--yolo`, `--allowed-tool <name>`, `--disabled-tool <name>` | Start ACP Server (blocks with `await new Promise(() => {})`) |
| `stop` | - | Stop ACP Server |
| `status` | - | Check if server is running |
| `agents` | - | Discover available agents (auto-starts server if needed) |
| `run <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Execute task via ACP (auto-starts server) |
| `stream <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Stream task output via ACP (auto-starts server, uses `process.stdout.write`) |

### 4. Architecture Overview (Dual-Platform)

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                         trae-plugin-cc                               │
│                                                                      │
│  ┌─────────────────────┐              ┌──────────────────────────┐  │
│  │   Claude Code       │              │      OpenCode            │  │
│  ├─────────────────────┤              ├──────────────────────────┤  │
│  │  Slash Commands     │              │ 9 Bun Tools              │  │
│  │   commands/*.md     │              │   .opencode/tools/*.ts   │  │
│  │ 4 MCP Tools (.mcp)  │              │ 10 Command Descriptions  │  │
│  │ 4 Lifecycle Hooks    │              │ Event Hooks (.opencode/) │  │
│  └──────────┬──────────┘              └──────────┬───────────────┘  │
│             │                                     │                  │
│  ┌──────────▼─────────────────────────────────────▼──────────────┐  │
│  │              Core CLI (src/ --> dist/index.js)                   │  │
│  │  run | review | adversarial-review | sessions | acp | setup |  │  │
│  │  status | result | cancel | rescue | hooks                     │  │
│  └──────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────┘  │
│                             │                                        │
│  ┌──────────────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────┐  │
│  │              TraeExecutor --> trae-cli subprocess               │  │
│  │          (inherits OAuth2 auth token, NO extra API Key)         │  │
│  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

**Key architectural decisions**:
- **Single shared CLI**: Both platforms call the same `dist/index.js`, enabling code reuse
- **esbuild bundling**: `dist/index.js` is a single-file bundle with shebang and externalized Node builtins
- **trae-cli subprocess**: All task delegation spawns `trae-cli --print <prompt>` as a child process
- **File-based session storage**: Reads trae-cli sessions from `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` (macOS) or `~/.cache/trae_cli/sessions/` (Linux)

### 5. Integration Points

#### 5a. Claude Code Integration

**MCP Tools** (`.mcp.json` - 4 tools):
| Tool | Required Params | Optional Params |
|------|----------------|-----------------|
| `trae_run` | `prompt` | `resume`, `session_id`, `yolo`, `allowed_tools[]`, `disallowed_tools[]`, `json_output`, `background`, `worktree`, `query_timeout`, `bash_tool_timeout`, `inject_context` |
| `trae_review` | - | `base_branch` (default "main"), `adversarial`, `background`, `yolo`, `json_output`, `session_id` |
| `trae_sessions` | `action` (enum: list/detail/conversation/tools/context/recent/find/delete) | `session_id`, `cwd`, `limit` (default 20), `topic` |
| `trae_acp` | `action` (enum: start/stop/status/agents/run/stream) | `prompt`, `yolo`, `allowed_tools[]`, `disabled_tools[]` |

**Slash Commands** (`commands/*.md` - 10 commands): `run`, `review`, `adversarial-review`, `sessions`, `acp`, `setup`, `status`, `result`, `cancel`, `rescue`

**Lifecycle Hooks** (`hooks/hooks.json` - 4 hooks):
| Hook | Trigger | Script | Behavior |
|------|---------|--------|----------|
| `SessionStart` | Claude Code startup | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` + `SessionStart` | Check trae-cli, remind bg tasks |
| `SessionEnd` | Claude Code exit | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` + `SessionEnd` | Clean old logs, remind running tasks |
| `Stop` | User stops operation | `stop-review-gate-hook.mjs` | Gate on uncommitted changes |
| `PostToolUse` | After `/trae:review` (matcher: `.trae:review.`) | `session-lifecycle-hook.mjs` + `PostReview` | Log review results |

#### 5b. OpenCode Integration

**Bun Tools** (`.opencode/tools/*.ts` - 9 tools):
| Tool File | CLI Mapped | Notes |
|-----------|-----------|-------|
| `trae-setup.ts` | `setup` | No args |
| `trae-run.ts` | `run` | Supports ALL CLI flags |
| `trae-review.ts` | `review` or `adversarial-review` | Routes based on `adversarial` boolean |
| `trae-sessions.ts` | `sessions` | Supports all 9 actions including `delete-smoke` |
| `trae-acp.ts` | `acp` | Start/stop/status/agents/run/stream |
| `trae-status.ts` | `status` | No args |
| `trae-result.ts` | `result` | Requires `task_id` |
| `trae-cancel.ts` | `cancel` | Requires `task_id` |
| `trae-rescue.ts` | `rescue` | Optional `context` arg |

**Command Descriptions** (`.opencode/commands/*.md` - 10 files): Agent-readable instructions with frontmatter `description:` header.

**Event Hooks** (`.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts`):
- `session.created` -> `SessionStart` (async)
- `session.deleted` -> `SessionEnd` (sync)
- `server.instance.disposed` -> `SessionEnd` (sync)

### 6. Core Utility Classes

| File | Class/Export | Purpose |
|------|-------------|---------|
| `src/utils.ts` | `isTraeCliInstalled()`, `getGitDiff()`, `runTraeCli()`, `ensurePluginDir()` + re-exports | Core utilities: trae-cli check, git diff, subprocess spawning |
| `src/utils/trae-executor.ts` | `TraeExecutor`, `TraeTaskConfig`, `TraeTaskResult` | Main task execution via `trae-cli --print` |
| `src/utils/session-reader.ts` | `SessionReader` + types | Read trae-cli session files from cache directory |
| `src/utils/auth-bridge.ts` | `AuthBridge`, `AuthStatus` | Parse `~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml` for auth status, model, plugins |
| `src/utils/context-bridge.ts` | `ContextBridge`, `ResumedPrompt` | Build context from previous sessions for `--resume` |
| `src/utils/acp-server-manager.ts` | `AcpServerManager` | Start/stop/status of `trae-cli acp serve` |
| `src/utils/acp-client.ts` | `AcpClient` + types | JSON-RPC client over STDIO for ACP protocol |
| `src/utils/branch-detection.ts` | `detectBaseBranch()`, `estimateReviewSize()`, `formatEstimate()` | Auto-detect base branch (main/master/develop), estimate review size for background mode recommendation |

### 7. Discrepancies: README vs Actual Code

1. **`acp` start blocks forever**: The README shows `acp start` as usable, but in code (`src/commands/acp.ts` line 61), `startServer()` does `await new Promise(() => {})` which blocks forever. This is intentional (keeping the STDIO pipe open), but users might not realize `acp start` is a long-running blocking call, not a fire-and-forget command.

2. **`rescue` command options**: The `.opencode/commands/trae-rescue.md` mentions `--retries <n>` and `--force` options, but **these are NOT implemented** in `src/commands/rescue.ts`. Only `--context` is parsed. This is a documentation discrepancy.

3. **MCP `trae_sessions` action enum**: `.mcp.json` lists 8 actions: `list`, `detail`, `conversation`, `tools`, `context`, `recent`, `find`, `delete`. The actual CLI and OpenCode tool both also support `delete-smoke` (9 actions). The MCP tool definition is missing `delete-smoke` from its enum.

4. **`hooks` command visibility**: The README and AGENTS.md list 12 commands (11 user-facing + `hooks` internal), but `src/index.ts` only shows 11 in its help text (`hooks` is missing from the usage message). The `hooks` command is internal-only.

5. **ACP description says "REST API"**: `.opencode/commands/trae-acp.md` says "via the ACP REST API" but the AGENTS.md explicitly states "ACP uses JSON-RPC over STDIO, NOT an HTTP server."

### 8. Key Technical Details

- **Build system**: esbuild (NOT tsc for production) -- bundles everything with externals for Node builtins (`child_process`, `fs`, `path`, `os`, `util`, `process`). Output has `#!/usr/bin/env node` shebang and is `chmod +x`.
- **trae-cli PATH resolution**: `~/.local/bin/` is prepended to PATH in `getTraeCliEnv()` and `auth-bridge.ts` and `acp-server-manager.ts`
- **Background task tracking**: Uses `.claude-trae-plugin/` directory with `<timestamp>.pid` and `<timestamp>.log` files. `cancel` uses `SIGKILL`.
- **git diff safety**: `isSafeGitRef()` validates branch names with `^[A-Za-z0-9._/-]+$` before passing to shell.
- **ACP protocol**: Strictly STDIO bidirectional JSON-RPC. No HTTP, no port numbers. The `AcpServerManager` spawns `trae-cli acp serve` and pipes stdin/stdout.
- **Session caching**: Direct file reads from trae-cli's cache directory. No HTTP calls needed for session queries.
</task_result>

1: # trae-plugin-cc
2: 
3: trae-plugin-cc支持在 **Claude Code** 和 **OpenCode**中无缝调用trae-cli，提供任务委托、代码审查、会话管理、ACP 协议通信等功能，实现跨框架一致的 AI Agent 协作体验。
4: 
5: ## 架构
6: 
7: ```
8: ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
9: │                         trae-plugin-cc                               │
10: │                                                                      │
11: │  ┌─────────────────────┐              ┌──────────────────────────┐  │
12: │  │   Claude Code       │              │      OpenCode            │  │
13: │  ├─────────────────────┤              ├──────────────────────────┤  │
14: │  │ ① 斜杠命令           │              │ ① Bun 工具 (9个)          │  │
15: │  │    commands/*.md     │              │    .opencode/tools/*.ts  │  │
16: │  │ ② MCP 工具 (4个)     │              │ ② 命令文档 (10个)         │  │
17: │  │    .mcp.json         │              │    .opencode/commands/   │  │
18: │  │ ③ 生命周期钩子       │              │ ③ 事件钩子                │  │
19: │  │    hooks/hooks.json  │              │    .opencode/plugins/    │  │
20: │  └──────────┬──────────┘              └──────────┬───────────────┘  │
21: │             │                                     │                  │
22: │  ┌──────────▼─────────────────────────────────────▼──────────────┐  │
23: │  │              Core CLI (src/ → dist/index.js)                   │  │
24: │  │  run | review | sessions | acp | setup | status | result |    │  │
25: │  │  cancel | rescue | hooks                                       │  │
26: │  └──────────────────────────┬────────────────────────────────────┘  │
27: │                             │                                        │
28: │  ┌──────────────────────────▼────────────────────────────────────┐  │
29: │  │              TraeExecutor → trae-cli 子进程                    │  │
30: │  │          (继承 OAuth2 auth token, 无需额外 API Key)             │  │
31: │  └───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘  │
32: └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
33: ```
34: 
35: ## 功能概览
36: 
37: | 功能 | 说明 | Claude Code | OpenCode |
38: |------|------|:-----------:|:--------:|
39: | 任务执行 | 自然语言任务委托，支持 YOLO、恢复、worktree | ✅ `/trae:run` + MCP | ✅ `trae-run` 工具 |
40: | 代码审查 | git diff 自动审查，支持标准/对抗性模式 | ✅ `/trae:review` + MCP | ✅ `trae-review` 工具 |
41: | 会话管理 | 历史会话查询、对话历史、工具调用、上下文摘要 | ✅ `/trae:sessions` + MCP | ✅ `trae-sessions` 工具 |
42: | ACP 协议 | JSON-RPC over STDIO，Agent 间协作 | ✅ `/trae:acp` + MCP | ✅ `trae-acp` 工具 |
43: | 后台任务 | 长时间任务后台执行，状态查询、结果获取、取消 | ✅ `/trae:status` 等 | ✅ `trae-status` 等 |
44: | 故障恢复 | 分析失败任务并提供诊断建议 | ✅ `/trae:rescue` | ✅ `trae-rescue` 工具 |
45: | 环境检查 | trae-cli 安装验证、认证状态检查 | ✅ `/trae:setup` | ✅ `trae-setup` 工具 |
46: | 生命周期钩子 | SessionStart/SessionEnd/Stop 自动触发 | ✅ hooks.json | ✅ .opencode/plugins/ |
47: 
48: ## 前置条件
49: 
50: - [trae-cli](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) 已安装并完成 auth 认证
51: 
52: ```bash
53: # 验证 trae-cli 是否可用
54: trae-cli --help
55: 
56: # 验证认证状态（需看到模型名称和登录地址）
57: cat ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml
58: ```
59: 
60: ## 安装
61: 
62: ### Claude Code 安装
63: 
64: #### 方式 1: Marketplace 安装（推荐）
65: 
66: ```bash
67: # 添加 Marketplace
68: claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc
69: 
70: # 安装插件
71: claude plugin install trae
72: 
73: # 验证安装
74: claude plugin list | grep trae
75: ```
76: 
77: 安装范围选项：
78: - `--scope user`（默认）: 全局可用
79: - `--scope project`: 仅当前项目可用
80: - `--scope local`: 仅当前会话可用
81: 
82: #### 方式 2: 本地目录安装
83: 
84: ```bash
85: git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
86: cd trae-plugin-cc
87: npm install
88: npm run build
89: 
90: # 添加本地 Marketplace
91: claude plugin marketplace add /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
92: claude plugin install trae
93: ```
94: 
95: ### OpenCode 安装
96: 
97: ```bash
98: git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
99: cd trae-plugin-cc
100: npm install
101: npm run build
102: 
103: # 安装 OpenCode 插件依赖
104: cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
105: ```
106: 
107: OpenCode 会自动发现 `.opencode/tools/` 下的工具和 `.opencode/commands/` 下的命令定义。
108: 
109: ## 安装后验证
110: 
111: ```bash
112: # 验证 trae-cli 认证
113: node dist/index.js setup
114: ```
115: 
116: 预期输出：
117: ```
118: ✅ trae-cli 已安装并可用！
119: 
120: ## 认证状态
121:   已认证: ✅
122:   配置文件: ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml (存在)
123:   模型: GLM-5
124:   登录地址: https://console.enterprise.trae.cn
125: 
126: ## ACP/MCP 服务
127:   ACP Server: trae-cli acp serve
128:   MCP Server: trae-cli mcp serve
129: ```
130: 
131: ## 使用指南
132: 
133: ### Claude Code 使用
134: 
135: #### 斜杠命令（用户主动触发）
136: 
137: ```bash
138: # 执行任务
139: /trae:run "重构用户认证模块"
140: 
141: # YOLO 模式（跳过工具确认）
142: /trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo
143: 
144: # 代码审查
145: /trae:review
146: 
147: # 对抗性审查
148: /trae:adversarial-review
149: 
150: # 恢复会话
151: /trae:run "继续之前的任务" --resume
152: 
153: # 会话管理
154: /trae:sessions list
155: /trae:sessions detail <session-id>
156: 
157: # ACP 协议
158: /trae:acp run "分析代码质量"
159: /trae:acp stream "实时分析"
160: ```
161: 
162: #### MCP 工具（AI 自主决策）
163: 
164: 插件安装后，`.mcp.json` 中定义的 4 个 MCP 工具自动注册，Claude AI 根据上下文自主调用：
165: 
166: | 工具 | 说明 | 触发场景 |
167: |------|------|---------|
168: | `trae_run` | 执行任务 | "用 Trae 重构这个模块" |
169: | `trae_review` | 代码审查 | "帮我审查当前变更" |
170: | `trae_sessions` | 会话管理 | "我之前用 Trae 做了什么？" |
171: | `trae_acp` | ACP 协议 | "通过 ACP 分析代码质量" |
172: 
173: #### 生命周期钩子
174: 
175: | 钩子 | 触发时机 | 行为 |
176: |------|---------|------|
177: | `SessionStart` | Claude Code 启动 | 检查 trae-cli 状态，提醒后台任务 |
178: | `SessionEnd` | Claude Code 退出 | 清理过期日志，提醒运行中的后台任务 |
179: | `Stop` | 用户停止操作 | 检测未提交变更，建议代码审查 |
180: | `PostToolUse` | 执行 `/trae:review` 后 | 记录审查结果 |
181: 
182: ### OpenCode 使用
183: 
184: #### Bun 工具（9 个）
185: 
186: OpenCode Agent 可直接调用这些工具：
187: 
188: | 工具 | CLI 命令 | 功能 |
189: |------|----------|------|
190: | `trae-setup` | `setup` | 检查 trae-cli 安装和认证 |
191: | `trae-run` | `run` | 执行自然语言任务 |
192: | `trae-review` | `review` / `adversarial-review` | 代码审查 |
193: | `trae-sessions` | `sessions` | 会话管理（支持 9 种动作） |
194: | `trae-acp` | `acp` | ACP 协议管理 |
195: | `trae-status` | `status` | 后台任务状态 |
196: | `trae-result` | `result` | 获取后台任务输出 |
197: | `trae-cancel` | `cancel` | 取消后台任务 |
198: | `trae-rescue` | `rescue` | 故障恢复诊断 |
199: 
200: #### 命令文档（10 个）
201: 
202: `.opencode/commands/` 下的 Markdown 文件为 Agent 提供可直接执行的指令：
203: 
204: - `trae-run.md` — 任务执行命令定义
205: - `trae-review.md` — 代码审查
206: - `trae-adversarial-review.md` — 对抗性审查
207: - `trae-sessions.md` — 会话管理
208: - `trae-acp.md` — ACP 协议
209: - `trae-setup.md` — 环境检查
210: - `trae-status.md` — 后台任务状态
211: - `trae-result.md` — 获取任务结果
212: - `trae-cancel.md` — 取消任务
213: - `trae-rescue.md` — 故障恢复
214: 
215: #### 事件钩子
216: 
217: `.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts` 将 OpenCode 事件映射为插件钩子：
218: - `session.created` → SessionStart 钩子
219: - `session.deleted` / `server.instance.disposed` → SessionEnd 钩子
220: 
221: ## 功能详解
222: 
223: ### 1. 任务执行
224: 
225: ```bash
226: /trae:run "任务描述" [options]          # Claude Code
227: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-run 工具
228: ```
229: 
230: | 选项 | 缩写 | 说明 |
231: |------|------|------|
232: | `--yolo` | `-y` | YOLO 模式，跳过工具确认 |
233: | `--background` | | 后台执行 |
234: | `--json` | | 结构化 JSON 输出（含 session_id） |
235: | `--resume [ID]` | | 恢复会话 |
236: | `--worktree [NAME]` | `-w` | 隔离 git worktree |
237: | `--allowed-tool <name>` | | 自动批准的工具 |
238: | `--disallowed-tool <name>` | | 自动拒绝的工具 |
239: | `--inject-context <id>` | | 注入其他会话上下文 |
240: | `--query-timeout <dur>` | | 单次查询超时 |
241: | `-c k=v` | | 覆盖配置项 |
242: 
243: ### 2. 代码审查
244: 
245: ```bash
246: /trae:review [options]                  # 标准审查
247: /trae:adversarial-review [options]      # 对抗性审查
248: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-review 工具 (adversarial=true)
249: ```
250: 
251: - 自动检测基准分支（main/master/develop）
252: - 自动估算变更规模，大型变更建议后台模式
253: - 对抗性模式：极度严苛，专门挑刺和质疑假设
254: 
255: ### 3. 会话管理
256: 
257: ```bash
258: /trae:sessions <action> [options]       # Claude Code
259: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-sessions 工具
260: ```
261: 
262: | 动作 | 说明 | 参数 |
263: |------|------|------|
264: | `list` | 列出会话 | `--cwd`, `--limit` |
265: | `recent` | 最近会话 | `--limit` |
266: | `detail` | 会话详情 | `--session-id` |
267: | `conversation` | 对话历史 | `--session-id`, `--limit` |
268: | `tools` | 工具调用记录 | `--session-id` |
269: | `context` | 上下文摘要 | `--session-id` |
270: | `find` | 按主题搜索 | `--topic` |
271: | `delete` | 删除会话 | `--session-id` |
272: | `delete-smoke` | 批量删除 smoke 会话 | — |
273: 
274: ### 4. ACP 协议通信
275: 
276: ACP 使用 **JSON-RPC over STDIO**（标准协议），非 HTTP 服务。
277: 
278: ```bash
279: /trae:acp <action> [options]            # Claude Code
280: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-acp 工具
281: ```
282: 
283: | 动作 | 说明 |
284: |------|------|
285: | `run "任务"` | 通过 ACP 执行任务 |
286: | `stream "任务"` | 流式执行（实时输出） |
287: | `agents` | 发现可用 Agent |
288: | `status` | 查看状态 |
289: 
290: ### 5. 后台任务管理
291: 
292: ```bash
293: /trae:status                             # 查看所有后台任务
294: /trae:result <task-id>                   # 获取任务结果
295: /trae:cancel <task-id>                   # 取消任务
296: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-status / trae-result / trae-cancel
297: ```
298: 
299: ### 6. 故障恢复
300: 
301: ```bash
302: /trae:rescue [--context TEXT]            # Claude Code
303: # 或 OpenCode Agent 调用 trae-rescue 工具
304: ```
305: 
306: 分析失败任务，收集错误日志和 git 状态，提交给 Trae Agent 诊断。
307: 
308: ## 上下文获取路径
309: 
310: | 路径 | 方式 | 适用场景 |
311: |------|------|---------|
312: | 文件系统直读 | `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` | 查询历史会话 |
313: | 结构化输出 | `trae-cli -p --json` | 执行任务并追踪 |
314: | ACP STDIO | `trae-cli acp serve` (JSON-RPC) | 跨框架 Agent 协作 |
315: 
316: ## 项目结构
317: 
318: ```
319: trae-plugin-cc/
320: ├── .claude-plugin/          # Claude Code 插件声明
321: │   ├── plugin.json
322: │   └── marketplace.json
323: ├── .mcp.json                # 4 个 MCP 工具定义
324: ├── commands/                # Claude Code 斜杠命令定义 (*.md)
325: ├── hooks/
326: │   └── hooks.json           # Claude Code 生命周期钩子
327: ├── scripts/                 # 钩子脚本 (*.mjs)
328: ├── src/                     # 核心 CLI 源码 (TypeScript)
329: │   ├── index.ts             # CLI 入口
330: │   ├── commands/            # 命令处理器
331: │   └── utils/               # 工具类
332: │       ├── trae-executor.ts       # 子进程执行器
333: │       ├── session-reader.ts      # 会话读取器
334: │       ├── acp-server-manager.ts  # ACP 服务器管理 (STDIO JSON-RPC)
335: │       ├── acp-client.ts          # ACP 客户端 (JSON-RPC)
336: │       ├── auth-bridge.ts         # 认证桥接
337: │       ├── context-bridge.ts      # 上下文注入
338: │       └── branch-detection.ts    # Git 分支检测
339: ├── .opencode/               # OpenCode 集成
340: │   ├── tools/               # 9 个 Bun 工具 (*.ts)
341: │   ├── commands/            # 10 个命令文档 (*.md)
342: │   ├── plugins/             # 事件钩子
343: │   └── package.json         # OpenCode 依赖
344: └── tests/                   # Jest 测试用例
345: ```
346: 
347: ## 开发
348: 
349: ```bash
350: # 编译（修改 src/ 后必须执行）
351: npm run build
352: 
353: # 测试
354: npm test
355: 
356: # 安装 OpenCode 依赖（仅首次）
357: cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
358: 
359: # 验证插件 (Claude Code)
360: claude plugin validate /path/to/trae-plugin-cc
361: ```
362: 
363: ### ⚠️ 编译规则
364: 
365: 修改任何 `src/*.ts` 文件后必须运行 `npm run build`，因为运行时入口是 `dist/index.js`（esbuild 打包）。
366: 
367: | 命令 | 输出 | 用途 |
368: |------|------|------|
369: | `npm run build` | `dist/index.js` (打包) | **运行时 CLI** (`node dist/index.js`) |
370: | `npm run build:tsc` | `dist/**/*.js` (分离文件) | 直接模块导入 |
371: 
372: ### OpenCode 开发注意事项
373: 
374: - `.opencode/tools/*.ts` 使用 **Bun** 运行时，**无需编译**
375: - `.opencode/commands/*.md` 为 Agent 提供可读指令
376: - 修改 `.opencode/plugins/trae-hooks.ts` 后重启 OpenCode 即可
377: - **但**：OpenCode 工具内部调用 `dist/index.js`，所以修改 `src/` 仍需 `npm run build`
378: 
379: ## 全量命令参考
380: 
381: ### 1. `setup` — 检查 trae-cli 安装与认证状态
382: 
383: ```bash
384: /trae:setup

386: 
387: | 参数 | 说明 |
388: |------|------|
389: | 无 | 无参数 |

393: ### 2. `run` — 委托任务给 Trae Agent
394: 
395: ```bash
396: /trae:run "任务描述" [options]
397: ```
398: 
399: | 参数 | 简写 | 说明 |
400: |------|------|------|
401: | `<prompt>` | 位置参数 | 任务描述（必需） |
402: | `--background` | | 后台执行 |

406: | `--resume` / `--resume=AUTO` | | 自动恢复最近会话 |

408: | `--worktree <name>` | `-w` | 使用指定 git worktree |

412: | `--query-timeout <duration>` | | 查询超时，如 `30s`, `5m` |
413: | `--bash-tool-timeout <duration>` | | Bash 工具超时 |
414: | `-c <key=value>` | | 配置覆盖（可多次使用） |
415: | `--inject-context <session-id>` | | 注入指定会话上下文 |

417: ---
418: 
419: ### 3. `review` — 标准代码审查
420: 
421: ```bash
422: /trae:review [options]
423: ```
424: 
425: | 参数 | 简写 | 说明 |

input.content:
# trae-plugin-cc

A **dual-platform** plugin that bridges [**Claude Code**](https://claude.ai/code) and [**OpenCode**](https://opencode.ai) with ByteDance [**Trae Agent**](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) (`trae-cli`). Delegate natural language tasks, run code reviews, manage sessions, and enable Agent-to-Agent communication — all inheriting trae-cli's OAuth2 auth (no extra API keys needed).

## Features

| Feature | Description |
|---------|-------------|
| **Task Delegation** | Send natural language prompts to Trae Agent with YOLO mode, session resume, git worktree isolation, and fine-grained tool permissions |
| **Code Review** | Automatic git diff + professional review — standard or adversarial (extremely strict), with smart base branch detection and change-size estimation |
| **Session Management** | Query trae-cli's history: conversations, tool calls, context summaries, topic search, and bulk cleanup |
| **ACP Protocol** | JSON-RPC over STDIO for inter-agent communication (start/stop servers, discover agents, execute/stream tasks) |
| **Background Tasks** | Long-running tasks with PID tracking, status listing, result retrieval, and cancellation |
| **Lifecycle Hooks** | Auto-triggered on session start/end/stop: env checks, background task reminders, uncommitted-change gates |

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│                        trae-plugin-cc                             │
│                                                                    │
│  ┌──────────────────────┐          ┌──────────────────────────┐   │
│  │    Claude Code       │          │       OpenCode           │   │
│  ├──────────────────────┤          ├──────────────────────────┤   │
│  │ 10 Slash Commands    │          │ 9  Bun Tools (.ts)       │   │
│  │ 4  MCP Tools (.json) │          │ 10 Command Docs (.md)    │   │
│  │ 4  Lifecycle Hooks   │          │ Event Hooks (.ts)        │   │
│  └──────────┬───────────┘          └──────────┬───────────────┘   │
│             │                                  │                    │
│  ┌──────────▼──────────────────────────────────▼───────────────┐   │
│  │              Core CLI (src/ → dist/index.js)                 │   │
│  │  setup | run | review | adversarial-review | sessions |      │   │
│  │  acp | status | result | cancel | rescue | hooks            │   │
│  └──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘   │
│                             │                                       │
│                    ┌─────────▼──────────┐                          │
│                    │    trae-cli        │                          │
│                    │  (OAuth2 inherit)  │                          │
│                    └────────────────────┘                          │
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
```

Both platforms share the same core CLI (`dist/index.js`). Claude Code invokes via slash commands/MCP/hooks; OpenCode invokes via Bun tools that `spawn("node", [dist/index.js, ...])`.

## Prerequisites

- **Node.js 18+** (runtime)
- **trae-cli** installed and authenticated

```bash
# Verify trae-cli
trae-cli --help

# Verify auth (should show model + login URL)
cat ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml
```

## Installation

### Claude Code

**Option 1: Marketplace (recommended)**

```bash
claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc
claude plugin install trae
claude plugin list | grep trae
```

Scope: `--scope user` (global) | `--scope project` (current project) | `--scope local` (current session)

**Option 2: Local directory**

```bash
git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
claude plugin marketplace add "$(pwd)"
claude plugin install trae
```

### OpenCode

```bash
git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
```

OpenCode auto-discovers tools in `.opencode/tools/` and commands in `.opencode/commands/`.

### Verify Installation

```bash
node dist/index.js setup
```

Expected output:
```
✅ trae-cli 已安装并可用！

## 认证状态
  已认证: ✅
  模型: GLM-5
  登录地址: https://console.enterprise.trae.cn
```

## Quick Start

### Claude Code (slash commands)

```
/trae:run "重构用户认证模块"           # execute task
/trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo         # skip tool confirmations
/trae:review                           # standard review
/trae:adversarial-review               # adversarial review
/trae:sessions list                    # list sessions
/trae:acp run "分析代码质量"            # execute via ACP
```

### OpenCode (Bun tools)

OpenCode Agent calls tools directly: `trae-run`, `trae-review`, `trae-sessions`, `trae-acp`, etc. See [Commands Reference](#commands-reference) for full parameter details.

## Commands Reference

All CLI commands: `node dist/index.js <command> [args]`

### `setup`

Verify trae-cli installation and auth status.

```bash
/trae:setup          # Claude Code
# OpenCode: trae-setup tool (no args)
```

---

### `run "prompt"`

Delegate a natural language task to Trae Agent.

```bash
/trae:run "描述任务" [options]
```

| Option | Alias | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| `--background` | | Run in background (returns job ID) |
| `--json` | | Structured JSON output with `session_id` |
| `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool permission confirmations |
| `--resume [ID]` | | Resume session (omit ID = auto-resume latest) |
| `--session-id <id>` | | Specify new session ID |
| `--worktree [name]` | `-w` | Isolated git worktree (omit name = `__auto__`) |
| `--allowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-approve tool (repeatable) |
| `--disallowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-reject tool (repeatable) |
| `--query-timeout <d>` | | Per-query timeout (e.g. `30s`, `5m`) |
| `--bash-tool-timeout <d>` | | Bash tool timeout |
| `-c <k=v>` | | Config override (repeatable) |
| `--inject-context <id>` | | Inject another session's context |

**Examples:**
```bash
/trae:run "重构认证模块" --background --json
/trae:run "继续" --resume --yolo
/trae:run "修复 bug" --worktree --allowed-tool Edit --allowed-tool Bash
```

---

### `review` / `adversarial-review`

Code review with automatic git diff.

```bash
/trae:review [options]                   # standard
/trae:adversarial-review [options]       # adversarial (strict)
# OpenCode: trae-review tool with adversarial: true/false
```

| Option | Alias | Description |
|--------|-------|-------------|
| `--base <branch>` | | Base branch (auto-detected: main/master/develop) |
| `--background` | | Run in background (recommended for large diffs) |
| `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool confirmations |
| `--json` | | Structured JSON output |
| `--session-id <id>` | | Specify session ID |

Auto-detects base branch and estimates review size, recommending background mode for large changes.

---

### `sessions <action>`

Manage trae-cli's historical sessions (reads from file cache directly — no HTTP calls).

```bash
/trae:sessions <action> [options]
```

| Action | Args | Options | Description |
|--------|------|---------|-------------|
| `list` | | `--cwd`, `--limit` (default 20) | List all sessions |
| `recent` | | `--cwd` | Most recent session for cwd |
| `detail <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Session metadata + event counts |
| `conversation <id>` | `<session-id>` | `--limit` (default 50) | Conversation messages |
| `tools <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Tool call stats + records (up to 30) |
| `context <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Full context summary |
| `find <topic>` | `<topic>` | | Search by keyword |
| `delete <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Delete a session |
| `delete-smoke` | | | Bulk delete sessions with "smoke" in ID/title |

---

### `acp <action>`

ACP protocol: **JSON-RPC over STDIO** (not HTTP). Enables Agent-to-Agent communication.

```bash
/trae:acp <action> [options]
```

| Action | Args | Description |
|--------|------|-------------|
| `start` | `--yolo`, `--allowed-tool`, `--disabled-tool` | Start ACP Server (blocks, keeps STDIO pipe open) |
| `stop` | | Stop ACP Server |
| `status` | | Check server status |
| `agents` | | Discover available agents (auto-starts server if needed) |
| `run <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Execute task via ACP (auto-starts server) |
| `stream <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Stream task output in real-time (auto-starts server) |

> **Note**: `acp start` is a blocking call — it holds the process alive for the STDIO pipe. Use `agents`, `run`, or `stream` for interactive use (they auto-start the server).

---

### `status`

List all background tasks (reads `.claude-trae-plugin/` for PID files).

```bash
/trae:status
```

---

### `result <task-id>`

Get output of a background task.

```bash
/trae:result <task-id>
```

---

### `cancel <task-id>`

Force-kill a background task (SIGKILL).

```bash
/trae:cancel <task-id>
```

---

### `rescue`

Diagnose recent task failures, collect error logs and git status.

```bash
/trae:rescue [--context text]
```

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `--context <text>` | Additional context for diagnosis |

---

### Lifecycle Hooks

Auto-triggered — no manual invocation needed.

| Hook | Trigger | Behavior |
|------|---------|----------|
| `SessionStart` | Claude Code startup / OpenCode session.created | Check trae-cli, remind background tasks |
| `SessionEnd` | Claude Code exit / OpenCode session.deleted | Clean old logs, remind running tasks |
| `Stop` | User stops operation | Gate on uncommitted changes |
| `PostToolUse` | After `/trae:review` | Log review results |

---

### `hooks <type>` (internal)

Internal hook handler — invoked by lifecycle scripts, not users.

```bash
trae-plugin-cc hooks session-start|session-end|stop-gate
```

## Project Structure

```
trae-plugin-cc/
├── .claude-plugin/          # Claude Code plugin + marketplace manifest
├── commands/                # Slash command docs (*.md)
├── .mcp.json                # 4 MCP tool definitions
├── hooks/hooks.json         # Claude Code lifecycle hooks
├── scripts/                 # Hook scripts (*.mjs)
├── src/                     # Core CLI (TypeScript → dist/index.js)
│   ├── index.ts             # Entrypoint
│   ├── commands/            # Command handlers
│   └── utils/               # TraeExecutor, SessionReader, AuthBridge, AcpClient...
├── .opencode/               # OpenCode integration
│   ├── tools/               # 9 Bun tools (*.ts)
│   ├── commands/            # 10 command docs (*.md)
│   ├── plugins/             # Event hooks
│   └── package.json         # OpenCode deps (@opencode-ai/plugin)
└── tests/                   # Jest tests
```

## Development

```bash
npm run build          # esbuild → dist/index.js (run after ANY src/ change)
npm test               # jest (all tests)
cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..   # OpenCode deps (once)
```

### ⚠️ Build Rule

`npm run build` uses **esbuild** (bundled single file with shebang) — this is the **production entrypoint**. `npm run build:tsc` produces separate `.js` files for module imports but is not used at runtime.

| Command | Output | Used By |
|---------|--------|---------|
| `npm run build` | `dist/index.js` (bundled) | **Runtime CLI** |
| `npm run build:tsc` | `dist/**/*.js` (separate) | Direct module imports |

**Always run `npm run build` after modifying `src/` before testing.** This applies to OpenCode too — its tools spawn `dist/index.js`.

## Session Cache Paths

trae-cli stores sessions on disk (read directly by this plugin):

| Platform | Path |
|----------|------|
| macOS | `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` |
| Linux | `~/.cache/trae_cli/sessions/` |

## License

MIT

 # trae-plugin-cc
 
-A **dual-platform** plugin that bridges [**Claude Code**](https://claude.ai/code) and [**OpenCode**](https://opencode.ai) with ByteDance [**Trae Agent**](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) (`trae-cli`). Delegate natural language tasks, run code reviews, manage sessions, and enable Agent-to-Agent communication — all inheriting trae-cli's OAuth2 auth (no extra API keys needed).
+The plugin bridges [**Claude Code**](https://claude.ai/code) and [**OpenCode**](https://opencode.ai) with ByteDance [**Trae Agent**](https://docs.trae.cn/cli) (`trae-cli`). Delegate natural language tasks, run code reviews, manage sessions, and enable Agent-to-Agent communication — all inheriting trae-cli's OAuth2 auth (no extra API keys needed).
 
 ## Features
 
 | Feature | Description |
 |---------|-------------|
 | **Task Delegation** | Send natural language prompts to Trae Agent with YOLO mode, session resume, git worktree isolation, and fine-grained tool permissions |
 | **Code Review** | Automatic git diff + professional review — standard or adversarial (extremely strict), with smart base branch detection and change-size estimation |
 | **Session Management** | Query trae-cli's history: conversations, tool calls, context summaries, topic search, and bulk cleanup |
 | **ACP Protocol** | JSON-RPC over STDIO for inter-agent communication (start/stop servers, discover agents, execute/stream tasks) |
 | **Background Tasks** | Long-running tasks with PID tracking, status listing, result retrieval, and cancellation |
 | **Lifecycle Hooks** | Auto-triggered on session start/end/stop: env checks, background task reminders, uncommitted-change gates |
 
 ## Architecture
 
 ```
 ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
 │                        trae-plugin-cc                             │
 │                                                                    │
 │  ┌──────────────────────┐          ┌──────────────────────────┐   │
 │  │    Claude Code       │          │       OpenCode           │   │
 │  ├──────────────────────┤          ├──────────────────────────┤   │
-│  │ 10 Slash Commands    │          │ 9  Bun Tools (.ts)       │   │
-│  │ 4  MCP Tools (.json) │          │ 10 Command Docs (.md)    │   │
+│  │ 10 Slash Commands    │          │ 10 Commands (/trae:*)    │   │
+│  │ 4  MCP Tools (.json) │          │ 9  Bun Tools (.ts)       │   │
 │  │ 4  Lifecycle Hooks   │          │ Event Hooks (.ts)        │   │
 │  └──────────┬───────────┘          └──────────┬───────────────┘   │
 │             │                                  │                    │
 │  ┌──────────▼──────────────────────────────────▼───────────────┐   │
 │  │              Core CLI (src/ → dist/index.js)                 │   │
 │  │  setup | run | review | adversarial-review | sessions |      │   │
 │  │  acp | status | result | cancel | rescue | hooks            │   │
 │  └──────────────────────────┬──────────────────────────────────┘   │
 │                             │                                       │
 │                    ┌─────────▼──────────┐                          │
 │                    │    trae-cli        │                          │
 │                    │  (OAuth2 inherit)  │                          │
 │                    └────────────────────┘                          │
 └─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┘
 ```
 
-Both platforms share the same core CLI (`dist/index.js`). Claude Code invokes via slash commands/MCP/hooks; OpenCode invokes via Bun tools that `spawn("node", [dist/index.js, ...])`.
+Both platforms share the same core CLI (`dist/index.js`) with unified `/trae:*` command interface. Claude Code additionally supports MCP tools for AI-autonomous invocation.
 
 ## Prerequisites
 
 - **Node.js 18+** (runtime)
 - **trae-cli** installed and authenticated
 
 ```bash
 # Verify trae-cli
 trae-cli --help
 
 # Verify auth (should show model + login URL)
 cat ~/.trae/trae_cli.yaml
 ```
 
 ## Installation
 
 ### Claude Code
 
 **Option 1: Marketplace (recommended)**
 
 ```bash
 claude plugin marketplace add https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc
 claude plugin install trae
 claude plugin list | grep trae
 ```
 
 Scope: `--scope user` (global) | `--scope project` (current project) | `--scope local` (current session)
 
 **Option 2: Local directory**
 
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
 cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
 claude plugin marketplace add "$(pwd)"
 claude plugin install trae
 ```
 
 ### OpenCode
 
 ```bash
 git clone https://github.com/wangxumarshall/trae-plugin-cc.git
 cd trae-plugin-cc && npm install && npm run build
 cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..
 ```
 
 OpenCode auto-discovers tools in `.opencode/tools/` and commands in `.opencode/commands/`.
 
 ### Verify Installation
 
 ```bash
 node dist/index.js setup
 ```
 
 Expected output:
 ```
 ✅ trae-cli 已安装并可用！
 
 ## 认证状态
   已认证: ✅
   模型: GLM-5
   登录地址: https://console.enterprise.trae.cn
 ```
 
 ## Quick Start
 
-### Claude Code (slash commands)
+Both Claude Code and OpenCode support the same `/trae:*` command interface:
 
 ```
 /trae:run "重构用户认证模块"           # execute task
 /trae:run "修复登录bug" --yolo         # skip tool confirmations
 /trae:review                           # standard review
 /trae:adversarial-review               # adversarial review
 /trae:sessions list                    # list sessions
 /trae:acp run "分析代码质量"            # execute via ACP
 ```
 
-### OpenCode (Bun tools)
+> **Note**: Claude Code additionally registers 4 MCP tools (`trae_run`, `trae_review`, `trae_sessions`, `trae_acp`) for AI-autonomous invocation beyond what the user can trigger manually.
 
-OpenCode Agent calls tools directly: `trae-run`, `trae-review`, `trae-sessions`, `trae-acp`, etc. See [Commands Reference](#commands-reference) for full parameter details.
-
 ## Commands Reference
 
-All CLI commands: `node dist/index.js <command> [args]`
+All commands are invoked as `/trae:<command> [args]` in both Claude Code and OpenCode.
 
 ### `setup`
 
 Verify trae-cli installation and auth status.
 
 ```bash
-/trae:setup          # Claude Code
-# OpenCode: trae-setup tool (no args)
+/trae:setup
 ```
 
 ---
 
 ### `run "prompt"`
 
 Delegate a natural language task to Trae Agent.
 
 ```bash
 /trae:run "描述任务" [options]
 ```
 
 | Option | Alias | Description |
 |--------|-------|-------------|
 | `--background` | | Run in background (returns job ID) |
 | `--json` | | Structured JSON output with `session_id` |
 | `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool permission confirmations |
 | `--resume [ID]` | | Resume session (omit ID = auto-resume latest) |
 | `--session-id <id>` | | Specify new session ID |
 | `--worktree [name]` | `-w` | Isolated git worktree (omit name = `__auto__`) |
 | `--allowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-approve tool (repeatable) |
 | `--disallowed-tool <n>` | | Auto-reject tool (repeatable) |
 | `--query-timeout <d>` | | Per-query timeout (e.g. `30s`, `5m`) |
 | `--bash-tool-timeout <d>` | | Bash tool timeout |
 | `-c <k=v>` | | Config override (repeatable) |
 | `--inject-context <id>` | | Inject another session's context |
 
 **Examples:**
 ```bash
 /trae:run "重构认证模块" --background --json
 /trae:run "继续" --resume --yolo
 /trae:run "修复 bug" --worktree --allowed-tool Edit --allowed-tool Bash
 ```
 
 ---
 
 ### `review` / `adversarial-review`
 
 Code review with automatic git diff.
 
 ```bash
 /trae:review [options]                   # standard
 /trae:adversarial-review [options]       # adversarial (strict)
-# OpenCode: trae-review tool with adversarial: true/false
 ```
 
 | Option | Alias | Description |
 |--------|-------|-------------|
 | `--base <branch>` | | Base branch (auto-detected: main/master/develop) |
 | `--background` | | Run in background (recommended for large diffs) |
 | `--yolo` | `-y` | Skip tool confirmations |
 | `--json` | | Structured JSON output |
 | `--session-id <id>` | | Specify session ID |
 
 Auto-detects base branch and estimates review size, recommending background mode for large changes.
 
 ---
 
 ### `sessions <action>`
 
 Manage trae-cli's historical sessions (reads from file cache directly — no HTTP calls).
 
 ```bash
 /trae:sessions <action> [options]
 ```
 
 | Action | Args | Options | Description |
 |--------|------|---------|-------------|
 | `list` | | `--cwd`, `--limit` (default 20) | List all sessions |
 | `recent` | | `--cwd` | Most recent session for cwd |
 | `detail <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Session metadata + event counts |
 | `conversation <id>` | `<session-id>` | `--limit` (default 50) | Conversation messages |
 | `tools <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Tool call stats + records (up to 30) |
 | `context <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Full context summary |
 | `find <topic>` | `<topic>` | | Search by keyword |
 | `delete <id>` | `<session-id>` | | Delete a session |
 | `delete-smoke` | | | Bulk delete sessions with "smoke" in ID/title |
 
 ---
 
 ### `acp <action>`
 
 ACP protocol: **JSON-RPC over STDIO** (not HTTP). Enables Agent-to-Agent communication.
 
 ```bash
 /trae:acp <action> [options]
 ```
 
 | Action | Args | Description |
 |--------|------|-------------|
 | `start` | `--yolo`, `--allowed-tool`, `--disabled-tool` | Start ACP Server (blocks, keeps STDIO pipe open) |
 | `stop` | | Stop ACP Server |
 | `status` | | Check server status |
 | `agents` | | Discover available agents (auto-starts server if needed) |
 | `run <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Execute task via ACP (auto-starts server) |
 | `stream <prompt>` | `<prompt>` | Stream task output in real-time (auto-starts server) |
 
 > **Note**: `acp start` is a blocking call — it holds the process alive for the STDIO pipe. Use `agents`, `run`, or `stream` for interactive use (they auto-start the server).
 
 ---
 
 ### `status`
 
 List all background tasks (reads `.claude-trae-plugin/` for PID files).
 
 ```bash
 /trae:status
 ```
 
 ---
 
 ### `result <task-id>`
 
 Get output of a background task.
 
 ```bash
 /trae:result <task-id>
 ```
 
 ---
 
 ### `cancel <task-id>`
 
 Force-kill a background task (SIGKILL).
 
 ```bash
 /trae:cancel <task-id>
 ```
 
 ---
 
 ### `rescue`
 
 Diagnose recent task failures, collect error logs and git status.
 
 ```bash
 /trae:rescue [--context text]
 ```
 
 | Option | Description |
 |--------|-------------|
 | `--context <text>` | Additional context for diagnosis |
 
 ---
 
 ### Lifecycle Hooks
 
 Auto-triggered — no manual invocation needed.
 
 | Hook | Trigger | Behavior |
 |------|---------|----------|
 | `SessionStart` | Claude Code startup / OpenCode session.created | Check trae-cli, remind background tasks |
 | `SessionEnd` | Claude Code exit / OpenCode session.deleted | Clean old logs, remind running tasks |
 | `Stop` | User stops operation | Gate on uncommitted changes |
 | `PostToolUse` | After `/trae:review` | Log review results |
 
 ---
 
 ### `hooks <type>` (internal)
 
 Internal hook handler — invoked by lifecycle scripts, not users.
 
 ```bash
 trae-plugin-cc hooks session-start|session-end|stop-gate
 ```
 
 ## Project Structure
 
 ```
 trae-plugin-cc/
 ├── .claude-plugin/          # Claude Code plugin + marketplace manifest
 ├── commands/                # Slash command docs (*.md)
 ├── .mcp.json                # 4 MCP tool definitions
 ├── hooks/hooks.json         # Claude Code lifecycle hooks
 ├── scripts/                 # Hook scripts (*.mjs)
 ├── src/                     # Core CLI (TypeScript → dist/index.js)
 │   ├── index.ts             # Entrypoint
 │   ├── commands/            # Command handlers
 │   └── utils/               # TraeExecutor, SessionReader, AuthBridge, AcpClient...
 ├── .opencode/               # OpenCode integration
 │   ├── tools/               # 9 Bun tools (*.ts)
 │   ├── commands/            # 10 command docs (*.md)
 │   ├── plugins/             # Event hooks
 │   └── package.json         # OpenCode deps (@opencode-ai/plugin)
 └── tests/                   # Jest tests
 ```
 
 ## Development
 
 ```bash
 npm run build          # esbuild → dist/index.js (run after ANY src/ change)
 npm test               # jest (all tests)
 cd .opencode && npm install && cd ..   # OpenCode deps (once)
 ```
 
 ### ⚠️ Build Rule
 
 `npm run build` uses **esbuild** (bundled single file with shebang) — this is the **production entrypoint**. `npm run build:tsc` produces separate `.js` files for module imports but is not used at runtime.
 
 | Command | Output | Used By |
 |---------|--------|---------|
 | `npm run build` | `dist/index.js` (bundled) | **Runtime CLI** |
 | `npm run build:tsc` | `dist/**/*.js` (separate) | Direct module imports |
 
 **Always run `npm run build` after modifying `src/` before testing.** This applies to OpenCode too — its tools spawn `dist/index.js`.
 
 ## Session Cache Paths
 
 trae-cli stores sessions on disk (read directly by this plugin):
 
 | Platform | Path |
 |----------|------|
 | macOS | `~/Library/Caches/trae_cli/sessions/` |
 | Linux | `~/.cache/trae_cli/sessions/` |
 
 ## License
 
 MIT

parts.text:
现在我明白了用户的意思。用户指出 OpenCode 也可以通过 `/trae xxx` 来使用。

实际上，根据 `.opencode/commands/*.md` 的定义，这些命令文档是为 OpenCode Agent 提供指令的。用户可能是在说：

1. OpenCode 的命令也是以 `trae-` 前缀命名的（如 `trae-run`, `trae-review` 等）
2. 在 OpenCode 中，用户可以通过某种方式触发这些命令，类似于 `/trae:run` 的形式

但根据项目结构：
- Claude Code 的斜杠命令格式是 `/trae:run`, `/trae:review` 等（定义在 `commands/*.md`）
- OpenCode 的工具名是 `trae-run`, `trae-review` 等（定义在 `.opencode/tools/*.ts`）

用户可能在说：OpenCode 中也可以使用类似 `/trae:run` 这样的命令格式。这可能是 OpenCode 的特性，允许用户使用 `/` 前缀来调用工具。

或者，用户的意思是 README 应该体现 OpenCode 的命令格式也是以 `trae-` 为前缀的，并且它们也可以被用户直接调用（不仅仅是被 Agent 自主调用）。

让我更新 README，体现 OpenCode 的命令也可以通过类似的格式使用，或者至少更正 README 中暗示"只有 Claude Code 有命令接口，OpenCode 只有工具"的不准确表述。


我需要澄清一下两个平台的命令格式差异。Claude Code 使用 `/trae:run` 这样的斜杠命令，而 OpenCode 的工具名是 `trae-run`。用户提到 OpenCode 也可以用 `/trae xxx` 格式，所以我应该检查 README 中是否有需要更新的地方，确保两种平台的命令触发方式都被准确描述。

# /trae:run

**Description:**
将任务描述直接交给 Trae Agent (`trae-cli`) 执行。支持会话恢复、工具控制、结构化输出、隔离工作树等高级选项。

**Usage:**
```bash
/trae:run "自然语言任务描述" [options]
```

**Options:**
- `--background`: 将任务放到后台运行
- `--json`: 返回结构化 JSON 输出 (含 session_id)
- `--yolo` / `-y`: YOLO 模式，跳过工具权限确认
- `--resume [SESSION_ID]`: 恢复会话，不指定 ID 则自动恢复最近会话

OpenCode 的命令文档定义在 `.opencode/commands/*.md` 中，但用户说 OpenCode 也可以用 `/trae xxx` 的格式来使用。

可能的情况是：
1. OpenCode 也支持读取 `commands/*.md` 文件中的命令定义，从而支持 `/trae:run` 这样的格式
2. 或者 OpenCode 有自己的某种机制来解析 `/trae:` 前缀

用户的意思很明确：README 应该体现 OpenCode 也可以使用 `/trae:xxx` 格式的命令。

让我更新 README，把 Claude Code 和 OpenCode 的命令调用方式统一表述，不再暗示 OpenCode 只能通过工具调用。

实际上，根据项目的架构说明：
- Claude Code 和 OpenCode 共享同一个 core CLI
- `.opencode/commands/*.md` 是 OpenCode 的命令文档
- `commands/*.md` 是 Claude Code 的斜杠命令文档

但用户说 OpenCode 也可以用 `/trae xxx`，这说明 OpenCode 也可以识别和使用这些命令格式。
